V6 concept autoencoder: detached geometry with gradient leak, web dashboard

Key changes:
- Per-slot classifiers and contrastive loss for direct slot assignment (32/32 by step 1K)
- Detached encoder/decoder training with 10% gradient leak to keep encoder info-rich
- Cross-reconstruction loss (encode A, decode toward paraphrase B)
- Web dashboard (Flask + Chart.js) with mobile-responsive layout, auto-refresh,
  and comparison overlay against archived runs (clipped to active step range)
- Updated probe_geometry.py for 32-slot V6 architecture
- Updated plot_training.py with V6 panels (classifier, geometry, slot assignment)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add unified generation evaluator, fix FSDP generation for text-only, blog reports

- New src/evaluation/generation.py: GenerationEvaluator class used by both
  training callback and standalone CLI (scripts/evaluate.py)
- Fix text-only FSDP generation: add summon_full_params guard in _generate_one
  to prevent 'weight must be 2-D' crash from sharded embed_tokens
- Fix ESM-3 FSDP generation: summon_full_params for all FSDP strategies,
  cast inputs_embeds to bf16 for dtype consistency
- Refactor GenerationSamplesCallback as thin wrapper around GenerationEvaluator
- Add blog posts, figures, and analysis data for ESM-3+MLP combined SFT results
- Add progress report: docs/research/sft_esm3_mlp_combined_report.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

planning: structured question types + chat-style view + fix stale state.json path

Question model:
- PlanQuestion type: text | select | multiselect | confirm with options[]
- Planner prompt outputs structured questions with type+options
- init.ts routes to correct clack prompt (select/multiselect/confirm/text) by type
- Daemon mode emits questionType+options in CLOUDY_PLAN_QUESTION: marker
- AI assumption call now has 30s timeout (was unbounded — caused 3hr zombie process)

Planning chat view:
- Replaced spinner+log+question-card with chat-style conversation
- plan_progress → grouped agent-log bubbles (live log lines)
- plan_question → question bubble: pill buttons (select), checkboxes (multiselect), Yes/No (confirm), textarea (text)
- User answers saved as right-aligned answer bubbles; full conversation history preserved
- plan_saved → summary bubble with task list

Bug fix:
- savePlanFromState and /state endpoint both read root .cloudy/state.json (stale from prior run)
- Fixed: read .cloudy/current → .cloudy/runs/<runName>/state.json instead

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v1.1.0 — settings panel, live config/category editing, theme support

New features:
- Settings panel (⚙ top-right) with 4 tabs: Appearance, General,
  App Categories, Browser Rules
- Dark / Light / System theme toggle — instant, persisted in localStorage
- Auto-categorize toggle saved to config.json via new /api/config endpoint
- App Categories editor: add/remove app names per category, saved live
- Browser Rules editor: add/delete/reorder keyword→category rules, saved live
- monitor.py now reloads categories.json + config.json on every poll —
  all settings changes take effect within one poll interval, no restart needed
- New API endpoints: GET/POST /api/categories, GET/POST /api/config

Fixes:
- Removed Path | None union type hint (Python 3.9 compatibility)
- deploy.sh now calls install.py --defaults on remote instead of legacy install.sh

Docs:
- VERSION file added (1.1.0)
- README: version badge, Settings Panel section, updated config table,
  auto_categorize key, updated file reference
- DEPLOY.md: updated file reference table
- config.json: auto_categorize key + descriptive comments
- install.py: writes auto_categorize to generated config
- install.sh: legacy notice in header

Sync reaudit.js prompt to match api.js for scoring consistency

same model. Both paths now use the identical detailed prompt.

commit.message:
docs: fix web UI setup instructions — add Force Save requirement

LibreNMS validates SNMP connectivity before saving credentials. Since
Fritz!Box has no SNMP agent, this always fails and reverts the settings
unless Force Save is toggled ON before clicking Save.

Also clarify the two-tab workflow:
  Device Settings tab (SNMP OFF) → set OS = fritzbox
  SNMP tab (SNMP ON, v2c, Force Save ON) → set Community = user:password

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent duplicate questions in the pool across difficulty slots

The same question was appearing in EASY, MEDIUM, and HARD slots (up to
123 copies of one question), causing players to see the same question
in different games with different point values.

- Add getExistingQuestionKeys() to fetch all existing (question_text, correct_answer)
  pairs for a category before inserting
- Filter out duplicates in fillSlot(), including intra-batch dedup
- Also removed 1,053 existing duplicate rows directly in Supabase DB,
  keeping the oldest copy per unique (question_text, correct_answer)

Two on-chain transactions for unlimited off-chain payments.

video area with Cinzel/Crimson Pro typography, gold section headers, and

matching the user's display name before signing. Signed agreements show

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: Blackwell WMMA attention optimization, MoE NVFP4 auto-detect, cuBLASLt probe fix

Blackwell WMMA attention: parallel softmax with warp shuffle XOR reduction,
__expf fast math, fused Phase 2+3 (softmax + O_acc rescale + SP conversion).
pp512 +55%, pp128 +10% on WMMA fallback path.

MoE NVFP4: removed d_model<4096 threshold for MoE models — expert weights
dominate VRAM and sparse activation limits quant error accumulation.
Qwen3-Coder-30B: 247→265 tok/s (+7%), Nemotron-30B: 68→75 tok/s (+10%).

cuBLASLt NVFP4: rewrote probe with correct config (BF16 output, OP_T,
D_SCALE_MODE=SCALAR_32F) matching NVIDIA's LtNvfp4Matmul sample. Confirmed
no FP4 kernels for sm_120 in cuBLAS 13.2 — auto-activates when NVIDIA adds
support. Added bf16→fp16 conversion path for GEMM output.

commit.message:
pool-manager: hotplug vsock per-slot instead of baking in snapshot

CLH snapshot embeds the vsock socket path. Restoring to a different
slot fails because CLH tries to bind the original path. Fix: boot
template WITHOUT vsock, hotplug it per-slot via vm.add-vsock after
restore. This gives each concurrent slot its own vsock socket path.

Also simplify snapshot() now that the Content-Length fix resolved
the 400 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Joshua Perry <josh@6bit.com>

feat: appointment scheduling with route-based availability and conflict detection

  distance, and timezone (Settings > Appointments)

  appointments panel; opens from opportunity detail page
- Schema: added indexes on estimateAt and assignedToId+estimateAt

commit.message:
Fix dynamic helper injection — prevent undefined function errors in all MCPs

Root cause: exec() in index.mjs used a hardcoded list of helper functions to
inject into page.evaluate(). When new helpers were added to commands.mjs
(e.g. clickSidebarTab, findButtonByText), they were missed and tools failed
with "<function> is not defined".

Fix: Replace hardcoded list with dynamic collection of ALL exports from
commands.mjs using Object.entries(commands).filter(...).map(...). This
ensures every helper — existing and future — is automatically available
in the browser context.

Changes:
- src/templates/mcp-server-template.mjs: Replace executeCommand() with
  dynamic exec() that auto-injects all exported functions
- MCPs/google-sites/server/index.mjs: Apply same dynamic injection fix
- MCPs/google-sites/server/commands.mjs: Export all 4 helper functions
  (clickByAriaLabel, findButtonByText, clickSidebarTab, clickMenuItem)
- skills/learn-webapp/SKILL.md: Add section 5.3.3 documenting the
  dynamic injection pattern and requiring all functions to be exported

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
